sources.quote: During a physical examination, a health care provider checks your body to determine if you do or do not have a physical problem.

Inspection (looking at the body), Palpation (feeling the body with fingers or hands), Auscultation (listening to sounds, usually with a stethoscope), Percussion (producing sounds, usually by tapping on specific areas of the body)

factsExtracted.value: Inspection, palpation, auscultation, and percussion of the abdomen by a health care provider.
